'''Tragrud''' was the only [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tragrud system/Legends|Tragrud system]], a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]], a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
